title: Task Contract
description: Schema for delegating bounded work slices to subagents. Each contract is derived from the current State Ledger.

task_id.description: Stable unique identifier for this delegated task

round_version.description: Version of the iteration round this contract was created in

objective.description: Single sentence describing what this task must achieve

in_scope.description: List of work items explicitly allowed

out_of_scope.description: List of work items explicitly forbidden

files_allowed.description: File paths or glops the subagent may read or modify

files_avoid.description: File paths or globs the subagent must not touch

must_respect.description: Contracts, constraints, or rules the subagent must honor

expected_deliverable.description: Concrete output the subagent must produce

stop_when.description: Clear finish line that ends this task

escalate_if.description: Decision point or blocker that requires main agent intervention
